user_stories.title: As a user, I want to be able to add new tasks to the todo app
user_stories.goal: Add new tasks to the todo app
user_stories.benefit: Increases productivity by allowing users to easily add new tasks
acceptance_criteria: User can enter a new task in a text input field
New task is saved and appears in the todo list
User receives a confirmation message or visual indicator that the task has been added

user_stories.title: As a user, I want to be able to mark tasks as completed in the todo app
user_stories.goal: Mark tasks as completed in the todo app
user_stories.benefit: Allows users to keep track of completed tasks and prioritize incomplete ones
acceptance_criteria: User can toggle the completion status of a task
Completed tasks are visually distinguished from incomplete ones in the todo list
User can view a report or filter of only completed tasks

user_stories.title: As a user, I want to be able to delete tasks from the todo app
user_stories.goal: Delete tasks from the todo app
user_stories.benefit: Allows users to remove tasks that are no longer relevant or necessary
acceptance_criteria: User can delete a task from the todo list
Deleted task is no longer visible in the todo list
User receives a confirmation message or visual indicator that the task has been deleted

Delete tasks from the todo app

code_artifacts.summary: Add new tasks to the todo app
